reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4770193588747859421/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1MTR4XxAB

reviews.comment:
Los playeros parecían no tener ganas de trabajar. En modo automático hacían todo. Nunca me ofrecieron limpiar los vidrios (tenía un cementerio de bichos pegados). Al ingresar al shop.... La atención mejoro, pero la oferta de productos es escasa, mal presentado todo y bastante antiguo.... Deben mejorar y mucho!!

(Translated by Google)
The attendants seemed unwilling to work. They were just going through the motions. They never offered to clean my windshield (it was covered in bugs). Once inside the shop... the service improved, but the product selection was limited, everything was poorly presented and quite old... They really need to improve!

reviewReply.comment:
Gracias Leandro por tus comentarios, tomaremos en cuenta la sugerencia.
Saludos...

reviews.comment:
Me decepcionó. No ofrece un servicio destacado como otras estaciones de servicio de YPF que tienen convenio con el ACA. El restaurante deja bastante que desear y no trabajan con la aplicación de YPF.

(Translated by Google)
I was disappointed. It doesn't offer the same level of service as other YPF stations that have agreements with the ACA. The restaurant leaves much to be desired, and they don't work with the YPF app.

reviewReply.comment:
Hola Valeria, si podes ampliar tu comentario a contacto@ypfacasantafe.com.ar
Gracias!!!
